Video.summary: In this gripping quarterfinal from the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships, Helen Wilhelm and Anna Shirley face Suzanne LeBlang and Teresa Tarn in a thrilling three-game battle. Featuring powerful strokes, smart resets, and tactical momentum shifts, this senior pro women’s doubles match highlights both experience and finesse. Watch as the teams adapt and clash in a showcase of skill and strategy at the highest level.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn

Video.summary: At the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, J.W. Johnson faces off against Brandon Lane in a hard-fought Men's Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal. With powerful rallies, strategic drops, and relentless pressure, this match highlights Johnson's athleticism and Lane’s grit as they fight for a spot in the finals. Recorded live on Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane

Video.summary: Get ready for a great singles match as Simone Jardim takes on Kristen Kopp at the Usopp National Pickleball Center. This venue, home to the Usopp Pickleball Academy, is a hub for lessons and training, making it an amazing facility for all things pickleball.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Women's Pro Singles - Jardim vs. Kop

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Women's Pro Singles - Jardim vs. Kop
US Open 2025 - Women's Pro Singles - Jardim vs. Kop
US Open 2025 - Women's Pro Singles - Jardim vs. Kop

Video.summary: This Men's Senior Pro Doubles match from the US Open 2025 features the team of Schiller and Weinbach battling Bronson and Coker. The commentary captures crucial moments, strategic missteps, and the competitive flow between these seasoned players, ultimately leading to a clear win for Schiller and Weinbach.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Schiller/Weinbach vs. Bronson/Coker

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Schiller/Weinbach vs. Bronson/Coker
US Open 2025 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Schiller/Weinbach vs. Bronson/Coker
US Open 2025 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Schiller/Weinbach vs. Bronson/Coker

Video.summary: Day 7 of the World Pickleball League brings a critical and dramatic game between Mumbai Pickle Power and the Bengaluru Jawans. The game begins with a highly anticipated Men's Singles match featuring Mumbai's American star Brandon Lane against Bengaluru's Jack Foster. The match lives up to the hype, showcasing fierce action.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Video.summary: Experience the electric atmosphere of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) Season 2 as the Mumbai Pickle Power face off against the Bengaluru Jawans in a high-stakes Tie 9. With Mumbai hunting for their first outright victory and Bengaluru desperate to bounce back from a recent loss, the pressure at the Jio World Garden is at an all-time high. Watch as elite players like the "unstoppable" Katrina Stewart dominate the court in singles, while Brandon Lane and Glaura Carvajal Lane attempt to turn the tide for Mumbai in a masterclass of tactical doubles. This tie features the league’s most innovative strategies, from high-risk Pickle Plays to the pursuit of the prestigious Band of Honor, ensuring every rally is a battle for survival on the road to the semi-finals.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League (WPBL) continues on Day 5 at the CCI Brabourne Stadium with a clash between Mumbai Pickle Power and the Chennai Super Champs.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Chennai - Day 5 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Chennai - Day 5 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Chennai - Day 5 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Chennai - Day 5 Tie 2

Video.summary: Experience the electrifying atmosphere at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden as the Mumbai Pickle Power hunt for their first tie victory of the season against the formidable Hyderabad Superstars. The tension reaches a fever pitch with Hyderabad’s "fireball" Shawn Mendes dominating the singles court, while Mumbai’s Brandon Lane and Santhosh Narayanan aim to turn the tide in the critical doubles matchups. Witness high-risk "Pickle Plays" and strategic substitutions as these athletes battle for precious points on the road to the semi-finals. With both teams fighting for survival on the league leaderboard, every rally is a masterclass in professional grit and tactical brilliance.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Mumbai - Day 7 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Mumbai - Day 7 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Mumbai - Day 7 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Mumbai - Day 7 Tie 2

Video.summary: The road to the championship reaches a fever pitch at Mumbai's Jio World Garden for the second semifinal of the World Pickleball League Season 2. In this high-stakes "penultimate tie," the defending champion Bengaluru Jawans face off against a hungry Delhi Dilwale squad led by coach Wesley Gabrielsson. Witness a clash of styles as the dominant Katerina Stewart, who has lost only one match all season, battles the passionate Alejandra Lopez in a critical women's singles opener. Tactical brilliance is on full display as Max Mantor and Trang Huynh attempt to dismantle the Jawans' defense in a high-scoring mixed doubles "exhibition". With every strategic "Pickle Play" and intense baseline rally potentially deciding who advances to the grand finale, the atmosphere is electric and the margins for error are razor-thin.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Bengaluru - Day 12 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Bengaluru - Day 12 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Bengaluru - Day 12 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Bengaluru - Day 12 Tie 2

Video.summary: Catch the final showdown from the 2023 English Nationals as Mollie Kubrick-Finney and Thaddea Lock challenge reigning champs Antonella Giuliano and Pei Chun Kao. Featuring sharp angles, aggressive volleys, and expert analysis, this match crowns the best in British women’s doubles.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock
English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock
English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock

Video.summary: The Coachella Valley Scorpions take on the Denver Iconics in a thrilling women’s National Pickleball League showdown from the 2024 season. From powerful baseline drives to lightning-fast net battles, both teams bring competitive spirit and polished teamwork to the court. Whether you're a seasoned fan or new to the NPL, this match showcases the rising talent and intensity of women’s pro pickleball. Every point matters — and momentum can shift in a flash.
Video.title: 2024 NPL – Women’s Team Match – Scorpions vs Iconics

Image.alt: 2024 NPL – Women’s Team Match – Scorpions vs Iconics
2024 NPL – Women’s Team Match – Scorpions vs Iconics
2024 NPL – Women’s Team Match – Scorpions vs Iconics

NPL - JBB United vs Picklers (Womens)
NPL - JBB United vs Picklers (Womens)

Video.summary: The Boca Raton Picklers face off against the Oklahoma City Punishers in a mixed team match.
Video.title: NPL - Picklers vs Punishers (Mixed)

Image.alt: NPL - Picklers vs Punishers (Mixed)
NPL - Picklers vs Punishers (Mixed)
NPL - Picklers vs Punishers (Mixed)

Video.summary: The grand finale of the 2025 NCPA Utah Regional Championship, the second of six regionals for the season. The rivalry matchup features the top teams from Utah Valley University and Utah Tech.This broadcast highlights the intense Men's Doubles game, where Utah Tech's star player Liam Duffin—hailed as one of the top collegiate players nationwide—teams up with Clayton Boydston to face Utah Valley's duo of Bryce Larson and Charles Case.The stakes are high: teams are competing for $5,000 in scholarship money and a coveted bid to the National Championship in St. Louis, Missouri, where $30,000 is on the line. Ultimately, Utah Tech's first team prevails, taking home the national bid and the Utah Regional title.
Video.title: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Valley vs. Utah Tech

Image.alt: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Valley vs. Utah Tech
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Valley vs. Utah Tech
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Valley vs. Utah Tech

Video.summary: NCPA Round of 16: University of Washington vs. Florida State University
Video.title: NCPA Round of 16: UW vs. FSU

Image.alt: NCPA Round of 16: UW vs. FSU
NCPA Round of 16: UW vs. FSU
NCPA Round of 16: UW vs. FSU

Video.summary: With Ray Colaiacovo sitting in for Tim Ring, Dave Benz talks about the growing craze of pickleball and how Pickleball first arrived to the masses on national TV via the US Open Pickleball Championship.
Video.title: The U.S. Open of Pickleball and the beginning of Pickleball on national TV

Image.alt: The U.S. Open of Pickleball and the beginning of Pickleball on national TV
The U.S. Open of Pickleball and the beginning of Pickleball on national TV
The U.S. Open of Pickleball and the beginning of Pickleball on national TV

Video.summary: Two of the sport’s biggest names meet in this Women’s Pro Singles pre-medal match at the 2023 US Open. Parris Todd and Simone Jardim bring elite-level strategy, precision, and intensity to the court in a pivotal semifinal showdown. Who will rise to the challenge and advance?
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Semifinal – Todd vs Jardim

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Semifinal – Todd vs Jardim
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Semifinal – Todd vs Jardim
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Semifinal – Todd vs Jardim

Video.summary: The Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal at the 2023 English Nationals delivers a riveting showdown as rising talents Daniel Wren and Alex Woolf take on the experienced pairing of Wesley Jackson and Bernie Audibert. Every point is a test of patience, power, and precision, with both teams refusing to back down in this critical battle for a spot in the semifinals.With crowd energy building and momentum swinging back and forth, this match captures the grit and skill that define top-tier British pickleball. Who will punch their ticket to the next round?
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal – Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal – Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal – Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal – Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert

Video.summary: Get ready for a thrilling Pro Mixed Doubles match featuring the number one ranked team of Megan Fudge and Jack Munro taking on Simone Jardim and her brother, Marcelo Jardim. This is the first time these two teams are facing off on the Championship Court. Don't miss the action!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim
